name: fim_full_directory_scan
description: ModuleFull (mode=0) — simulates first FIM scan of a monitored directory with many files. Manager executes deleteByQuery + bulk index for all received documents.
notes: sync_mode=0 triggers deleteByQuery on ALL Start indices before bulk indexing.
High data_size simulates a directory tree with many files (e.g. /etc/ or c:\windows\system32).
Expect higher latency on first EndAck due to deleteByQuery cost.
